# https://kprompt.ai/llms.txt
# Guidance for AI assistants and crawlers about kprompt.

> kprompt is an open-source AI Kubernetes CLI: natural language compiles into a reviewable PlanResult, then you approve before apply. Apache-2.0. Experimental. Local kubeconfig + BYOK — no cluster credentials uploaded to a control plane by default.

## Product
- Site: https://kprompt.ai
- Docs: https://kprompt.ai/docs
- Install: https://kprompt.ai/docs/install
- Quickstart: https://kprompt.ai/docs/quickstart
- Roadmap & vision: https://kprompt.ai/docs/roadmap
- Safety: https://kprompt.ai/docs/safety
- CI / PlanResult JSON: https://kprompt.ai/docs/ci
- Integrations: https://kprompt.ai/docs/integrations
- Multi-cluster: https://kprompt.ai/docs/multi-cluster
- GitHub: https://github.com/kprompt/kprompt

## Positioning (honest)
- Same NL-CLI lane as kubectl-ai; different mutate contract (plan → safety → approve).
- Not a K8sGPT fleet scanner; not an in-cluster agent framework; not a hosted Lens clone.
- Long-term direction: AI SRE (investigate / why / timeline) still under approval — see roadmap.

## Optional Team app
- https://app.kprompt.ai — early; CLI stays free; nothing to buy as a public signup product today.
